news.t: Regan Capital Launches the Regan Fixed Rate MBS ETF (NYSE: MBSX)

overview.description: The Regan Fixed Rate MBS ETF (MBSX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed to focus on investment grade US fixed rate mortgage-backed securities. The fund seeks to provide current income, allocating according to proprietary bottom-up analysis. MBSX was launched on May 1, 2025 and is issued by Regan.

data.title: Regan Capital Launches the Regan Fixed Rate MBS ETF (NYSE: MBSX)
data.text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Regan Capital, an investment firm with approximately $2.6 billion in assets under management, today announced the launch of the Regan Fixed Rate MBS ETF (NYSE: MBSX), an activ...
